headline: Bill Nicholson
body: A blue plaque in honour of our greatest ever manager, Bill Nicholson, was today unveiled in his home town of Scarborough, North Yorkshire, with the support of THSTOfficial. Mr Tottenham - never forgotten 🤍 Read more 👉 thfc.pro/4gRmFws
raw_text:
A blue plaque in honour of our greatest ever manager, Bill Nicholson, was today unveiled in his home town of Scarborough, North Yorkshire, with the support of @THSTOfficial.

Mr Tottenham - never forgotten 🤍
